queries.question: Show all opinion pieces and include just the featured articles from volume 02.
queries.sql:
SELECT News_Contents.Title 
FROM News_Contents JOIN Volumes ON News_Contents.Volume_ID = Volumes.id
WHERE News_Contents.News_Type = "Opinion Piece" OR News_Contents.News_Type = "Feature Article" AND Volumes.Issue_Number = "02"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?news_contents a :News_Contents .
  ?volumes a :Volumes .
  ?news_contents p:hasVolumes ?volumes .
  ?news_contents p:Title ?title .
  ?news_contents p:News_Type ?news_type_w .
  ?news_contents p:News_Type ?news_type_w2 .
  ?volumes p:Issue_Number ?issue_number_w .
  FILTER((STR(?news_type_w) = "Opinion Piece" || (STR(?news_type_w2) = "Feature Article" && (STR(?issue_number_w) = "02" || STR(?issue_number_w) = "2" || STR(?issue_number_w) = "2.0"))))
}

queries.question: Show me all opinion pieces and featured articles in volume 02.
queries.sql:
SELECT News_Contents.Title 
FROM News_Contents JOIN Volumes ON News_Contents.Volume_ID = Volumes.id
WHERE (News_Contents.News_Type = "Opinion Piece" OR News_Contents.News_Type = "Feature Article") AND Volumes.Issue_Number = "02"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?news_contents a :News_Contents .
  ?volumes a :Volumes .
  ?news_contents p:hasVolumes ?volumes .
  ?news_contents p:Title ?title .
  ?news_contents p:News_Type ?news_type_w .
  ?news_contents p:News_Type ?news_type_w2 .
  ?volumes p:Issue_Number ?issue_number_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?news_type_w) = "Opinion Piece" || STR(?news_type_w2) = "Feature Article")) && (STR(?issue_number_w) = "02" || STR(?issue_number_w) = "2" || STR(?issue_number_w) = "2.0")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me all opinion pieces and featured articles in volume 02.
